title: UK/Ghana: Exchange of Letters concerning certain (Commercial) Debts (The United Kingdom/Ghana Debt Agreement No. 1 (2025)) [TS No.61/2025]
body: "Published title: Exchange of Letters between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Ghana concerning certain (Commercial) Debts (The United Kingdom/Ghana Debt Agreement No. 1 (2025)). "
